itinerary.title: Welcome to Vietnam - Touch Down in Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description:
Your guide will meet you at Tan Son Nhat International Airport in Ho Chi Minh City and take you to your hotel so you can check in. After a long fight, get some rest, or explore this vibrant city at your leisure. NOTE: 

Please be aware that during the day, both the domestic and international gates may get busy. If you arrive and cannot find our representatives, please get in touch with your travel adviser so that we can help you identify them. The hotel's check-in time is 14:00, early check-in is available with a surcharge.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Full-day Journey into the Heart of the Mekong Delta (SIC Tour)
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00, after picking you up from your Ho Chi Minh City hotel, our guide will begin our group's journey to Ben Tre Province. Take a cruise down the Ham Luong River, which is a Mekong offshoot. We visit a few local businesses to get a sense of how the community's economy operates, such as a mat weaving or coconut processing workshop. A short walk through a tranquil village will allow your group to get a taste of life in Mekong Delta. After that, hop on a "xe loi," a motorized rickshaw, and head into the forest to see fruit farms

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels - Ho Chi Minh City Tour - Flight to Da Nang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Depart from the hotel lobby at 08:00 - 08:30 to meet our tour guide and begin the 70-kilometer road trip to the Cu Chi Tunnels. Explore a variety of subterranean tunnels that were used as military camps by the North Vietnamese army from 1955 to 1975, serving as anything from hospitals and bedrooms for the military. On the trip back to Ho Chi Minh City, a light lunch is served at a nearby restaurant. Afternoon

You shall leave your accommodation at 13:00 and head to the Reunification Palace, a preserved mansion that served as the President of the Republic of Vietnam's home. Take a tour...

itinerary.title: Strolling Through Time - Discover Hoi An's Ancient Beauty Half-day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your journey at the Hoi An Market, a bustling hub where vibrant colors, lively sounds, and rich aromas create an unforgettable shopping atmosphere. Just a short walk away, the Fujian Chinese Assembly Hall awaits with its striking gates, dragon motifs, and beautifully crafted rooftops. Here, you’ll gain insight into ancestor worship as you view the family altar and watch locals presenting their offerings. Your exploration continues with a visit to Hoi An’s well-preserved heritage homes, such as the Phung Hung Ancient House or Tan Ky Ancient House, both of which have endured more ...

itinerary.title: Free Day - Explore Hoi An at Your Leisure
itinerary.description:
You have the day off today to explore the fascinating city of Hoi An. In case you're seeking for a guided trip, our travel consultants are here to assist you if you need recommendations for places to visit and things to do:

Cam Thanh Coconut Village & Lantern Making Half Day	FROM US $35 /pax
Authentic Hoi An - Cooking Class & Biking Full Day	FROM US $67 /pax
Tra Que Village by Bike & Cooking Class Half Day	FROM US $42 /pax
Bike to My Son Sanctuary from Hoi An Day Trip	FROM US $99 /pax
Cooking Class Half-day Tour in Hoi An	FROM US $67 /pax

itinerary.title: Da Nang - Flight to Hanoi - Vietnam’s Timeless Capital
itinerary.description:
Morning

Before you leave your accommodation, eat a hearty breakfast. After that, we'll take you to the Da Nang Airport so you can catch your flight to Hanoi. Our kind driver will greet you when you arrive at Noi Bai Airport and take you to the hotel located in the heart of the city. Give yourself a moment to finish the check-in procedure and get comfortable in your lodging. You have the remainder of the day to yourself in Hanoi

itinerary.title: Half-day Hanoi City Tour - Uncover the Culture of Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Following a hearty breakfast, your tour guide will come to pick you up between 08:00 - 08:30. Your group will visit the most well-liked sights in Hanoi during the half-day city trip. First off, we go to see the Temple of Literature, which was Vietnam's first university and serves as a reminder of the influence of Confucianism on the country's past and present. Discover the history and take in the stunning architecture. Next up is the one-of-the-kind One Pillar Pagoda, which is renowned for its small yet exquisite design

itinerary.title: Sail into Serenity - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Charge yourself with a delightful breakfast in the morning. Then around 08:00 - 08:30, our driver will take you on a 2.5-hour road trip to Ha Long. After checking in at the port, the boat crew gives you a warm greeting with a cool drink when you get on the cruise. At around 12:00, the cruise begins with boarding. Enjoy the boat and the delectable on-board lunch with fresh seafood from the area while witnessingthousands of islets and limestone islands emerge from the emerald sea
itinerary.accommodation: On-board an overnight cruise in Halong Bay

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Discovery - Hanoi Transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

Partake a peaceful Tai Chi class in the morning and take in the breathtaking sunrise over the water. After a modest breakfast at 07:00 in the morning, spend the day kayaking or touring Halong's stunning caves. Return to the boat for check-out. Enjoy brunch as we head back to the main dock for the transfer to Hanoi. Around noon we'll arrive at the port and our crew will bid you farewell

itinerary.title: Farewell Vietnam - Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Before the drivers transfer you to the airport to take your departure flight, you have an amount of leisure time to relax and prepare. BestPrice Travel hopes you had a wonderful time during our trip!

NOTE: Your room is available until 12:00. If you need a late checkout, please contact your travel consultant.

highlights: Well designed itinerary helping you explore famous places from North to South with only 10 days.
A chance to visit top must-visit destinations like Saigon, Hoi An, Hanoi, and Halong Bay
Experience activities with local people such as: rowing boat in Mekong, making handicraft products, tasting local foods & drinks
Designed exclusively for small group tour as offering many group bonding activities
included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
2 domestic flights Ho Chi Minh - Da Nang and Da Nang - Ha Noi
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
